name: Bedtime below target and falling
description: Synthetic scenario testing the bedtime two-step advice. BG starts at 8.0 at 19:30 UTC (20:30 BST), drifts down through target to 6.2 by 20:10 UTC (21:10 BST, bedtime window). Tests that the bedtime nudge includes fast sugar + starchy when below target and falling, not starchy alone.
